arts.ttl: I'm the new Luka Modric wanted by two of Premier League's biggest clubs, but first I'm facing Celtic in Champions League
arts.sum: Martin Baturina has been compared to Luka Modric There are literally countless others who have squared-off against the Hoops including Real Madrid heavyweight Luka Modric for Los Blancos not too long ago.

arts.ttl: Alexandro Bernabei Celtic transfer latest as Luke McCowan prediction made – Pakhead state of play
arts.sum: Bernabei has been rewarded for his stellar displays with Brazilian top-flight club Internacional

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers pinpoints reason why Celtic hold belief that they can claim Dinamo Zagreb result
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has taken his side from the bottom of their Champions League group last year to within one victory of securing progression to the knockout playoff phase. Enjoying an upward trajectory, Celtic have taken two wins and two draws from their opening five Champions League matches this campaign, with a victory against Dinamo Zagreb tonight set to be enough to reach the next stage.

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb vs Celtic preview: Rodgers confident of ending CL away win drought
arts.sum: “To win away from home, because you know what it means to supporters as well as the points and you know that an away win at any level, but in particular in the Champions League, is a difficult challenge, it’s one that gives a real good feeling,” Rodgers said at his pre-match media briefing in the Maksimir Stadium on Monday night. Asked if he felt his team were now operating at a level where they should be confident about winning away in the Champions League, Rodgers said: “I don’t think there’s any doubt.

arts.ttl: Peter Lawwell praises club for keeping Celtic fans ‘silent’ – Brendan Rodgers’ side ‘very happy’ with outcome
arts.sum: Celtic will take on Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League today after Brendan Rodgers’ side settled for a 1-1 draw against Club Brugge in their last European tie. Cameron Carter-Vickers scored an own goal, and Daizen Maeda netted the equaliser in at Celtic Park against Club Brugge. Club Brugge’s Ardon Jashari had stated his side The post Peter Lawwell praises club for keeping Celtic fans ‘silent’ – Brendan Rodgers’ side ‘very happy’ with outcome appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers tells Croatian journalist which game is more important for Celtic fans, Dinamo Zagreb or Rangers
arts.sum: And on Sunday, Celtic face Rangers in the League Cup final as both Glasgow clubs look to win the first piece of available silverware this season. The Celtic boss faces Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League tonight as the Hoops look to get out of the league phase.

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart on Celtic's midfield as star who is 'very close' to becoming a starter pinpointed
arts.sum: Discussing Celtic’s midfield, Stewart pointed to the arrivals of Engels and McCowan as evidence of the new-found depth Rodgers has to play with in the engine room. Brendan Rodgers has lots of exciting competition for places at Celtic, with no area more well-stocked than the Bhoys’ midfield.

arts.ttl: Nenad Bjelica explains extent of Dinamo Zagreb's injury crisis ahead of facing Celtic
arts.sum: Speaking to the media ahead of Dinamo Zagreb’s clash against Celtic, Bjelica confirmed that several youngsters have been called up to the first-team amid an injury crisis that has left his side short. No room for Celtic complacency despite Dinamo Zagreb injuries

arts.ttl: Cameron Carter-Vickers surprised after hearing what the Croatian media said about Dinamo Zagreb vs Celtic
arts.sum: The Croatian media hyped up Celtic after they destroyed Ross County last week but it was what they were saying about Dinamo Zagreb that really surprised Hoops hero, Cameron Carter-Vickers . Carter-Vickers missed Celtic’s Champions League fixtures against Atalanta and Borussia Dortmund and here the Hoops defender explains why he’s looking forward to the Zagreb test.

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb star expresses home dressing room confidence ahead of Celtic Champions League clash
arts.sum: However, Dinamo Zagreb have picked up seven Champions League points and are expected to provide a stiff test despite their erratic domestic form under Nenad Bjelica. The Champions League picture for Celtic could become a lot clearer if they claim three points against Dinamo Zagreb this evening in Croatia.
